title: Every Weekend Is a Plan
scenario: Your friend group now does weekend trips and fancy brunches almost every week. Saying no feels like missing out. How do you handle the FOMO?

choices.label: Say yes to everything
choices.lesson: Social FOMO is a major driver of lifestyle inflation. Every 'just this once' that becomes weekly quietly resets your spending baseline.

choices.label: Join some, set a fun budget
choices.lesson: You don't have to say no to fun — just give it a budget. Deciding the number in advance lets you enjoy guilt-free without overspending.
